message:
fix(engine): length-prefix array boundaries in elision receipt deterministic hash

Add explicit u64 length prefixes before the denial_reasons and
required_assumptions arrays in ElisionDecisionReceipt::deterministic_hash.
Without these, two receipts with different array boundary positions but
identical concatenated strings would produce the same hash — e.g.
denial_reasons=["ab","c"] vs ["a","bc"]. The length prefix disambiguates
the boundary, making the hash injective over the structured fields.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
